steps.title: Isolate the variable term
steps.content:
Add $18$ to both sides of the inequality:
$$ax-18\le 30$$
$$ax\le 48$$

steps.title: Use the boundary
steps.content:
The solution is $x\ge -8$, so dividing by $a$ must flip the inequality. That means $a$ is negative, and the boundary must satisfy:
$$\frac{48}{a}=-8$$
